---
title: "Further Resources"
date: 2026-07-05
date-modified: last-modified
number-sections: true
toc: true
---

---------

<hr style="height:1pt; visibility:hidden;" />

## Learn more

### Courses and tutorials

- [Free Anthropic courses](https://anthropic.skilljar.com), for example:
  - Claude 101 and Claude Code 101
  - AI Capabilities and Limitations
  - AI Fluency for students and AI Fluency for teachers

- [Claude 101 Youtube playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLmWCw1CzcFilebjK89WLb5cAvM8K0cLB3)
- [Claude Skills Youtube playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLmWCw1CzcFim_hkruZSlABOUOAAQ5JMyo)
 
- From GitHub:
  - [How to get LLMs to do what you want](https://github.blog/ai-and-ml/github-copilot/github-for-beginners-how-to-get-llms-to-do-what-you-want)
  - [Prompt engineering](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/concepts/prompting/prompt-engineering)
  - [How to use GitHub Copilot in your IDE: Tips and Best Practices](https://github.blog/developer-skills/github/how-to-use-github-copilot-in-your-ide-tips-tricks-and-best-practices)
  - [Video: How to use GitHub Copilot -- the complete beginner's guide](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SJqGYwRq0uc)
  - [GitHub Copilot Cookbook](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/tutorials/copilot-cookbook)
  - [Copilot Customization Cheatsheet](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/reference/customization-cheat-sheet)

- [Introducing Posit AI for Positron and RStudio](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4er6aua7zyI)

### Other 

- [Prompt agents, skills, or MCP servers](https://opensource.posit.co/blog/2026-07-03_ai-newsletter/#prompt-agentsmd-skill-or-mcp-server) --- A blog post by RStudio on when to use prompts vs. skills vs. MCP servers (July 2026).

- [100 Pro Hacks for Claude Code](https://claude-code-hacks.lovable.app/)

- [The Hitchhiker’s Guide to Agentic AI](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2606.24937v1)

## Background reading

- [Ten simple rules for optimal and careful use of generative AI in science](https://journals.plos.org/ploscompbiol/article?id=10.1371/journal.pcbi.1013588) --- Helmy et al., PLOS Computational Biology, 2025, on best practices for using generative AI in science.

- [Why General AI Models Still Cannot Be Trusted for Data Analysis](https://nickpotkalitsky.substack.com/p/why-general-ai-models-still-cannot) --- a blog post by Nick Potkalitsky, PhD, on the limitations of general AI models for data analysis (June 2026).

- [Is AI ruining our skills? Early results are in — and they’re not good](https://www.nature.com/articles/d41586-026-01947-1) --- Nature news feature, June 2026, on the impact of AI on human skills.

- [Rethinking bioinformatics expertise in the era of artificial intelligence](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41746-026-02777-1) --- Perspective article in npj Digital Medicine, on the impact of AI on bioinformatics expertise (May 2026)

- [How Americans View AI in 2026](https://aiandacademia.substack.com/p/how-americans-view-ai-in-2026) --- a blog post by the AI and Academia newsletter on public perceptions of AI (June 2026)

## Useful tools

- [Gemini Chat Folders Chrome extension](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/gemini-chat-folders)
  --- to e.g. organize your Gemini chat history into folders.

## OSU and OSC content

- [Approved AI tools](https://ai.osu.edu/resources-buckeyes/approved-ai-tools)

- [Google Productivity Services info page](https://it.osu.edu/google-productivity-services)

- [OTDI's AI Courses](https://it.osu.edu/news/2026/05/18/take-your-ai-skills-next-level-otdis-new-courses)

- Recorded webinar on June 23:
  [Risk Management Series: Command AI Safely](https://go.osu.edu/rmsai)

- [OSC's page on available AI tools](https://www.osc.edu/services/artificial_intelligence_data_analytics_and_machine_learning)
